final:
// // This module subtracts the 4-bit input from the high byte of the 8-bit input on each clock edge, resetting to zero on reset.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input [7:0] a,
    input [3:0] b,
    output reg [11:0] c
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if(rst) begin
        c <= 0;
    end else begin
        c <= a + (b << 8);
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module subtracts the 4-bit input from the high byte of the 8-bit input on each clock edge, resetting to zero on reset.
